q: I passed my driving test for the first time. Then I felt like a load had been lifted off my mind. (Join the sentences, using ‘after’.) 2024
a: After passing my driving test first time, I felt like a load had been lifted off my mind.

q: They had checked the weather forecast. They set out on their journey. (Join the sentences, using ‘after’.) 2025
a: After they had checked the weather forecast, they set out on their journey.
